applicable_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2025修订版)

applicable_clauses.summary: 费用报销实行经办人真实性承诺、部门负责人业务审核、财务复核和授权审批相结合
审批权限按《XX证券授权管理办法》附件二执行
财务部门对票据合法性、费用归属、预算占用和制度标准进行复核
无专项审批时，报销金额不得超过对应制度标准的1.0倍
自2025年1月1日起施行，原2022版同时废止

applicable_policies.applicability_reason: Expense date 2025-10-03 falls after effective date 2025-01-01; this is the current governing policy

applicable_policies.title: XX证券授权管理办法

applicable_clauses.summary: 附件二适用于费用报销系统自动派生审批角色
3000≤金额<10000: 部门经理，并经财务复核

applicable_policies.applicability_reason: Referenced by 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md 第五条 for determining approval tiers

applicable_policies.title: XX证券差旅费管理办法

applicable_clauses.summary: 住宿标准: 高管级/一类城市: 1100元/人/晚
超过住宿标准且无专项审批的，不得报销超出部分

applicable_policies.applicability_reason: R004233 is travel_lodging type; lodging standards are governed by this policy

excluded_policies.title: XX证券费用报销管理办法(2022版)
excluded_policies.exclusion_reason: Repealed by 01_expense_reimbursement_2025.md 第十四条 effective 2025-01-01; historical thresholds (8000/30000) no longer apply

policy_timeline.2022_policy: Effective until 2024-12-31, thresholds: 8000→部门总经理, 30000→分管副总
policy_timeline.2025_policy: Effective 2025-01-01 onward, thresholds: AR-02(3000-10000)→部门经理+财务复核, AR-03(10000-50000)→部门总经理
